name: Floralgraphic Memory
short_description: After decided to skip school today, Rose whisked himself away to another world full of whimsies and magic.
detailed_description:
THIS GAME IS DESIGNED TO BE ENJOYED FOR ABOUT 20 MINUTES

---------------------------------


Chase Fox's fifth game.

Floralgraphic Memory is a tiny fantasy pastel drama kinetic visual novel that tells a story of a teenager named Rose who whisked himself away to another world after decided to skip school today.

This game is a kinetic visual novel, which means it will not provide choices that shape your story or any other interactions. The only ways to interact with the game are to click to move the story forward, click to explore things in the some scenes and use the scene jumper to jump to specific scenes in the story.

Story

Rose is a teenager who decides to skip school today for an unknown reason. He then whisked himself away to another world full of whimsies and magic.

Genre

Short, Light, Fantasy, Pastel Drama

Features

  • Original Art, Music & Sound Design
  • Scene Jumper : press Esc at any time to bring up a pause menu that will let you jump to specific scenes in the story, no save slot required

  • Hand-Crafted Art
    This game features digital art and watercolor art.
    Right-click at any point in the game to see the making process of the art.

    Digital Art


    Watercolor Art


  • Inspectable Environment
    In some scenes you can click to inspect some things in the frame.

---------------------------------

Story, Art, Music and Sound Design
by ChaseFOX

Proofread
by Eskay

---------------------------------
